title: Duplicate Boards Structure only in CRM

posts.author: Run2Catchwind (Lin Ma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Cannot duplicate a board without its data.
I can only create “template” and “use” the template. While the “template” pull all the data in the mother board, which is pretty dumb. I have to manually delete the data group by group.

What are you trying to achieve

Duplicate CRM boards without its data.

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: The template feature ends up copying all the data, which can be really frustrating when you just want the structure. I usually have to go through and delete everything manually, too. It would be great if there were a way to duplicate the board layout without bringing over the data.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Lin Ma:

Duplicate CRM boards without its data.

Hey I have an app called Create Templates which can help you with this if you just wanna create a Board Structure
